task: Deploy new code version to Winbull staging server with database backup

steps.notes: Connected to staging server via SSH
Created full database backup before deployment. --single-transaction is critical for InnoDB to avoid table locks.

steps.command: cd /var/www/winbull && git fetch origin && git log --oneline HEAD..origin/staging -5
steps.output:
abc1234 Fix rate calculation
def5678 Add new commodity type
ghi9012 Update config for SMS provider

steps.command: cd /var/www/winbull && git stash && git pull origin staging
steps.output:
Updating abc1234..ghi9012
Fast-forward
 15 files changed, 234 insertions(+), 89 deletions(-)
steps.notes: Stashed local changes and pulled latest from staging branch
Ran pending migrations with --force for non-interactive mode
Reload (not restart) Nginx to pick up any config changes without dropping connections
Restart queue workers to pick up new code
Health check confirms application is running
